prompt: Tight close-up on a weary middle-aged Chinese male office worker in a navy suit and red tie, holding a steel thermos in his left hand. He is wearing a forced, unwavering corporate smile. The camera slowly pulls back over 8 seconds, revealing the cubicle wall behind him is completely empty — no awards, no certificates, just a blank beige wall. His smile doesn't waver. The promo-bright golden lighting persists but starts to feel hollow.
